zh.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的兒子，於大約1388年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。他去世於1443年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾考可波斯帕斯享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的儿子，于大约1388年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。他去世于1443年在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾考可波斯帕斯享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar was born about 1388, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland as the son of Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March and Christina Seton. He died in 1443, in Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar est né environ 1388, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, fils de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March et Christina Seton. Il est décédé en 1443, à Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar wurde um 1388 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March und Christina Seton geboren. Er starb 1443 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar è nato il circa 1388 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland come figlio di Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March e Christina Seton. Morì nel 1443, nel Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbarは約1388年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでSir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of MarchとChristina Setonの息子として生まれた。彼は1443年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアコクブルンスプアスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar(은)는 대략 1388년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(와)과 Christina Seton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1443년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 콕번스팻h에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar nasceu aproximadamente 1388, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland filho de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March e Christina Seton. Ele faleceu em 1443, em Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar родился около 1388 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March и Christina Seton. Он умер в 1443 г. в местности коккбурнспат, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir David Dunbar nació aproximadamente 1388, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland como hijo de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March y Christina Seton. Murió en 1443, en Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
